channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dr Agarwal's Eye Hospital Offers Free Eye Camps for Women in Chennai Until March 31
item.description: In Chennai, Dr Agarwal's Eye Hospital is organising free eye check-up camps for women of all ages till March 31. This initiative marks the celebration of International Women's Day and aims to promote ...

item.title: Why Companies Should Prioritise Recruitment in the First Quarter
item.description: Many top-performing companies no dey wait until mid-year before dem start to hire new staff. Instead, dem dey push recruitment drive right from the first quarter (January to March) because na the best...

item.title: Historic South African Wesbank Audi S4 GTO race car listed for online auction
item.description: On 6 March 2026, a piece of South African motorsport history will be up for grabs when Collectingcars.com hosts an online auction featuring the legendary Audi S4 GTO. This iconic left-hand drive race ...

item.title: Nation Media Group Introduces AI Guidelines for Journalists
item.description: Nation Media Group (NMG), one of Kenya's leading media houses, has rolled out a new policy to guide the ethical and responsible use of artificial intelligence (AI) in its journalism operations. The po...

item.title: TPLB issues suspensions and fines to players, referees, and clubs after disciplinary incidents
item.description: The Tanzania Premier League Board (TPLB) has handed out several disciplinary actions following misconduct in recent NBC Premier League matches. Simba SC striker Seleman Mwalimu received a three-match ...

item.title: Winnipeg Woman Dies in Dominican Republic Bus Crash, Remembered for Generosity and Compassion
item.description: Kim Lafantaisie, a 57-year-old woman from Winnipeg, tragically died in a bus crash in Villa Hermosa, Dominican Republic, while on vacation with her husband. Known for her selflessness and generosity, ...

item.title: Funke Akindele to Empower Emerging Creatives with The Creative Blueprint 2.0
item.description: Award-winning actress and producer Funke Akindele don announce say her creative empowerment programme, 'The Creative Blueprint 2.0', go hold on 19th March for Landmark, Lagos. Dis na di second edition...

item.title: Challenges of Reporting on Iran Amid Media Restrictions and Conflict
item.description: Reporting on Iran is exceptionally challenging due to its deeply divided media environment and the heightened restrictions during periods of unrest or conflict. State-aligned media outlets, such as Is...

item.title: Trump demands unconditional surrender from Iran amid ongoing US-Israeli airstrikes on seventh day of conflict
item.description: The conflict between the United States, Israel, and Iran has entered its seventh day, marked by intense US-Israeli airstrikes causing widespread devastation across Iran, including in Tehran. US Presid...

item.title: Regional Project Launched to Protect Ruvuma River Basin and Coastal Ecosystems
item.description: Tanzania, Malawi and Mozambique have started a big regional project worth Sh18.2 billion, about $7.12 million, to protect the Ruvuma River Basin and nearby coastal ecosystems. The project go run for f...

item.title: Ramaphosa Criticizes Trump’s White Refugee Policy and Misunderstanding of South Africa
item.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa strongly criticized former U.S. President Donald Trump’s refugee policy that favored white Afrikaners, calling it 'racist' and highlighting Trump’s lack of unde...

item.title: US outlines timeline and strategy for Iran operations
item.description: The White House has indicated that US military operations against Iran are expected to conclude within four to six weeks. Spokeswoman Karoline Leavitt stated that the US is progressing towards control...

item.title: Fire in Tondo displaces hundreds of families and affects port operations
item.description: A major fire erupted in Tondo, Manila, in the early hours of March 7, 2026, displacing around 200 families and causing disruptions to port activities. The Manila Disaster Risk Reduction and Management...

item.title: Government plans tighter tax monitoring on trade and income in 2026/27 budget
item.description: The Kenyan government is stepping up efforts to collect more revenue in the 2026/27 financial year, targeting Sh219.4 billion in additional funds. Of this, Sh84 billion is expected to come from import...

item.title: Gulf residents' shifting reactions to the escalating US-Iran conflict and its regional fallout
item.description: Iran launched missile and drone attacks on US military sites in the Gulf, later expanding to airports, seaports, hotels, and oil refineries, following US-Israeli strikes on 28 February 2026 that kille...

item.title: President Samia Arrives in Arusha Ahead of EAC Summit
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has touched down in Arusha today, March 6, 2026, in preparation for the 25th Ordinary Summit of Heads of State of the East African Community (EAC) scheduled for tomorrow ...

item.title: Ryan cleared of all charges in Anton’s death case in 'What Lies Beneath' Episode 100
item.description: In the latest episode of the hit ABS-CBN series 'What Lies Beneath,' Ryan has been fully acquitted of all charges related to Anton’s death. Episode 100 delivers a pivotal moment in the storyline, reso...

item.title: Major Lotto Draws on March 6, 2026 Have No Jackpot Winners
item.description: On Friday, March 6, 2026, the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) reported that no one won the major lotto jackpots. In the Ultra Lotto 6/58, the winning numbers were 37-34-13-26-06-54, but n...

item.title: Over 600 Merchant Ships Stranded Near Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising War Risks
item.description: With escalating tensions in West Asia, over 600 merchant vessels, including around 250 oil tankers and gas carriers, remain stranded upstream of the Strait of Hormuz. The recent attacks on ships like ...

item.title: Ensuring Women’s Safety in the Digital Era While Advancing AI
item.description: The article highlights the urgent need to prioritise women’s digital safety amid the rapid growth of artificial intelligence (AI) in India. With increasing Internet accessibility, women are facing var...
